entries.note: V61-C reuses the shipped V61-A communication surfaces and shipped V61-B bridge-office / rewitness surfaces by default.
V61-C keeps the advisory governed communication hardening recommendation function extensional and replayable over the exact shipped V61-A/V61-B lineage.
V61-C requires one explicit frozen-policy anchor for replayable advisory recommendation.
V61-C carries the explicit positive rewitness basis or certificate posture directly into the advisory evidence basis instead of overreading outcome alone.
V61-C keeps the selected governed communication exemplar path-level and non-generalizing by default.
V61-C keeps candidate outcomes non-entitling, non-escalating, and scope-unspecified without a later lock.
V61-C makes provenance tags and lineage-root dedup explicit on the advisory hardening register itself.
